Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $90 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 73% odds crude will reach $90. Closes in 9d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $95 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (39%) that crude reach $95. Closes in 9d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $65 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude drop below $65. Closes in 9d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $80 in July?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (38%) that crude drop below $80. Closes in 9d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: WTI Crude Oil (WTI) closes above $88 on July 22?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (40% YES) crude reach $88. Closes today. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Trump create a tariff dividend by December 31, 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Tariffs directly impact export demand for US grains -- a driver of basis and futures.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 86% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 14% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 50+ bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 85% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.
